title: capsella bursa-pastoris var. ruderalis
intro: Capsella bursa-pastoris var. ruderalis, also known as shepherd's purse, is a biennial or annual plant that belongs to the mustard family, Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in menstrual relief, reduce blood pressure, and support the immune system. Capsella bursa-pastoris var. ruderalis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal creams and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
